summary: Verified new features: Reviews, Addresses, Lookbook (backend + frontend). Backend endpoints all green. Frontend works for Shop The Look (home + admin), Address Book in Account, Saved-address picker on Checkout. Frontend Product Reviews component is imported but NOT rendered on ProductDetail page — reviews UI is missing.
passed: Auth: demo & admin login work (token returned, user object correct)
POST /api/products/{id}/reviews validation: rating=6 -> 422, valid -> 200 with review object
Duplicate review by same user -> 400 'You already reviewed this product'
POST review on unknown product -> 404 'Product not found'
DELETE /api/reviews/{id} as admin (non-owner) -> 200 (admin can delete any)
POST /api/addresses invalid phone (too short) -> 422; first valid address auto sets is_default=true
POST /api/addresses with is_default=true unsets others (verified via list)
GET /api/lookbook -> 200, 4 seeded items each enriched with products array
POST /api/lookbook as customer -> 403 'Admin only'; as admin -> 200 with new id
Frontend Home: Shop The Look section renders 4 looks; click opens modal listing tagged products (verified 2 products in first look)
Frontend Account: Saved Addresses section renders; add-address form works end-to-end; card count goes 1 -> 2 after save
Frontend Checkout: 'select-address' saved-address picker renders for logged-in user with addresses
Frontend Admin /admin/lookbook: lists 4 seeded looks, has create form + delete buttons; admin nav link present

failed.issue: ProductReviews component is imported but NEVER rendered inside the JSX of ProductDetail.jsx. The reviews section ([data-testid=product-reviews]) does not appear on /product/:id, so users cannot view or submit reviews from the UI.
failed.evidence: grep shows `import ProductReviews from '@/components/ProductReviews'` at line 6 of /app/frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.jsx, but no `<ProductReviews .../>` usage; render returns closes at line 94 with no reviews block. Playwright on /product/<id>: [data-testid=product-reviews] count=0, star buttons count=0; screenshot shows footer directly after product gallery.

action_items: Add `<ProductReviews productId={product.id} />` (or similar) inside the ProductDetail JSX, e.g. just before the closing wrapper div on line 94, so the Reviews UI renders on the product detail page.

success_rate.frontend: ~83% (5/6 UI flows green; PDP reviews missing)
